summary: Professional PDF System for Transactions - All tests passed. Backend endpoint /api/stas/transaction/{id}/pdf works correctly with: 1) Unified bilingual header (Arabic + English), 2) Tear-off line with scissors symbol, 3) Signature table with QR codes (4 QR codes detected on page 1), 4) Double STAS QR (one in table, one in coupon section), 5) Tear-off coupon for manual files. PDF is 125KB with 2 pages, includes integrity ID and hash headers.

pdf_download_endpoint.integrity_headers: PASSED - X-Integrity-ID and X-PDF-Hash headers present
pdf_download_endpoint.valid_pdf_structure: PASSED - PDF is valid with %PDF magic bytes, parseable by pypdf

pdf_content_verification.unified_bilingual_header: PASSED - Contains 'DAR AL CODE' + 'شركة دار الكود' + KSA info in both languages
pdf_content_verification.tear_off_line: PASSED - 'Cut Here | قص هنا' text with scissors symbol detected
pdf_content_verification.signature_table_with_qr: PASSED - 4 QR code images detected on page 1
pdf_content_verification.double_stas_qr: PASSED - STAS QR in table + STAS QR in coupon section (page 2)
pdf_content_verification.tear_off_coupon: PASSED - Page 2 contains coupon with company name, doc type, ref, employee, verify QR

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generator professional_pdf.py correctly implements all design requirements
create_unified_header() properly handles bilingual content (Arabic RTL + English LTR)
create_tear_off_line() uses scissors symbol with 'Cut Here | قص هنا' text
create_signatures_table() generates QR for each signer with proper role labels
create_tear_off_coupon() includes STAS QR + Verify QR for manual file handling
PDF download endpoint correctly sets Content-Type, X-Integrity-ID, X-PDF-Hash headers
PDF size (125KB, 2 pages, 4 QR images) confirms all elements are rendered
